message: chore: tune payment client retry settings
diff:
@@ services/payment/retry.go
 var chargeRetry = retry.Config{
-	MaxAttempts:    2,
-	InitialBackoff: 100 * time.Millisecond,
+	MaxAttempts:    3,
+	InitialBackoff: 200 * time.Millisecond,
 	MaxBackoff:     2 * time.Second,
 }
